name: Dungeon Full Dive: Game Master Edition
short_description: DFD: Game Master Edition is the ultimate TTRPG toolkit to bring your games to the next level. With the ability to host and manage sessions, create limitless characters and maps, and access exclusive GM tools. This edition offers unparalleled control over your tabletop experiences.
detailed_description:
Beginner? Wishlist the Player Edition!

An upcoming FREE version of DFD designed for players with limited character and map-building capabilities.


JOIN OUR DISCORD

Join our Discord community to keep updated with the latest Dungeon Full Dive news and meet other adventurers!


Roadmap

Interested in what is coming next and what has been released so far?
Check out our development roadmap over here:



Dungeon Full Dive's roadmap is shared with the community so that everyone can vote on their most requested features or even suggest new features!


About the Game

Bring Your Tabletop Adventures to the Next Level


"DFD: Game Master Edition" is the best way to play your TTRPGs online. Designed for both game masters and players who demand the ultimate in flexibility, creativity, and immersion for their Tabletop RPGS. This edition unlocks the full potential of your adventures.

Features of the "Dungeon Full Dive: Game Master Edition":

  • Host Unlimited Sessions: The GM Edition allows you to host as many TTRPG sessions as you like. Play together with your friends or with new people you meet online.
  • Exclusive GM Edition Dice: Add a new layer of personality to all of your TTRPG sessions with an exclusive dice set, adding unmatched style to your rolls.

  • Full Access to GM Tools: Leverage the full suite of DFD's Game Master tools in online play. From immersive soundboards to dynamic weather systems, these tools are crafted to bring your storytelling to the next level!
  • Unlimited Character Creation: Craft and customize characters without limits. The GM Edition removes the limit of available character slots from 3 to unlimited.
  • Unlimited Map Building Capabilities: Build and customize worlds without limits. The GM Edition removes the limit of available map slots from 2 to unlimited.


Jump into an adventure with your friends or build an entirely new party with random travelers, whether it’s using a mouse and keyboard or in VR. And, of course, cross-play is supported between PC Players and VR Players!


Play any tabletop RPG that you want. Create and modify your character sheets and notes in-game. Furthermore, DFD includes game mechanics and stat integration for 5e. That means that things like initiative tracking can easily be done with just a click of a button!


Place your characters or even monsters, then switch into their view to experience the adventures from their eyes. For the first time ever, interact with the tabletop adventures of your dreams: Drink in the tavern, play some instruments in the city market, or explore the dark forests.


You can adapt, choose, or even create your own battle maps. DFD offers a variety of lovingly handcrafted 3D maps for you to use for your adventures or to modify with our map editor, where you can also create your maps from scratch! Choose your battles, whether it’s in the icy depths of the mountains or in an underground cave.


Build an army of miniatures using DFD’s powerful character editor! Create your heroes and use our powerful customization system to make all of them unique: Be whoever -or whatever- you want to be.
